articles.title: “U.S. Soccer Is Not Ready for Primetime”: Americans React to USMNT’s Dismal World Cup Exit - The Hollywood Reporter
articles.description: After a shellacking from Belgium, prominent figures from the world of U.S. sports didn't hold back in their criticisms of the home team.
articles.content:
Don’t cry because it’s over. Smile because it happened… right? Right? 
After a thorough thumping from Belgium, the U.S.’s World Cup dreams are over in the Round of 16. After a string of encouraging … [+11463 chars]

articles.title: Ronaldo says his last World Cup is over but Portugal decision can wait - Al Jazeera
articles.description: Portugal captain admits his team’s last-16 match against Spain was his final outing in the World Cup.
articles.content: Portugal forward Cristiano Ronaldos final World Cup ended with a Spanish sting in the tail, courtesy of Mikel Merinos last-gasp winner that earned a 1-0 round-of-16 win, but he was unwilling to make … [+1984 chars]
